creator: exploringlondon
caption:
One of the best immersive experiences in London has just opened and you need to go! ad-pr @cleopatraexperience_ takes you into the extraordinary world of Egypt’s Last Great Queen with cutting edge, immersive storytelling and real artefacts!

Experience holograms, VR, a free-roaming: metaverse, a huge 360 degree projection room and more. This is one of the world’s highest rated immersive exhibitions and it’s a must see!

🎟️ Use code: EXPLORINGLONDON10 for 10%
off your tickets on @fever_uk  Tickets from £27 per adult and £22 per child
📍 Immerse LDN, Excel Waterfront
👥 All ages welcome
🗓️ Open until 12th July 2026
⏳ Approx 1 hour 30 mins

#cleopatraexperience #thingstodoinlondon #feverambassador
